name: sendGift
description: Sends a gift to the given user or channel chat. The gift can't be converted to Telegram Stars by the receiver

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id is not specified. Unique identifier of the target user who will receive the gift.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if user_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the chat or username of the channel (in the format @username) that will receive the gift.

parameters.name: gift_id
parameters.description: Identifier of the gift; limited gifts can't be sent to channel chats

parameters.name: pay_for_upgrade
parameters.description: Pass True to pay for the gift upgrade from the bot's balance, thereby making the upgrade free for the receiver

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text that will be shown along with the gift; 0-128 characters

parameters.name: text_parse_mode
parameters.description: Mode for parsing entities in the text. See formatting options for more details. Entities other than “bold”, “italic”, “underline”, “strikethrough”, “spoiler”, “custom_emoji”, and “date_time” are ignored.

parameters.name: text_entities
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the gift text. It can be specified instead of text_parse_mode. Entities other than “bold”, “italic”, “underline”, “strikethrough”, “spoiler”, “custom_emoji”, and “date_time” are ignored.
